docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-28-2022 - CONTINUED ON COURT'S OWN MOTION DUE TO THE CONDITION OF THE COURT CALENDAR TO AUG-23-2022 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-23-2022 - JUDGMENT.

PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$305.00);[2ND SERVICE TO: "JOHN DOE" - AT 2261 MARKET STREET,#4050, SF, CA 94114] SERVED APR-22-2022, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT LUGG, INC.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LEVY, JOSHUA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LUGG, INC. $1,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $275.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,275.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,900.00 FILED BY LEVY, JOSHUA AS TO DEFENDANT LUGG, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-28-2022 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$225.00);[1ST SERVICE TO CSC-LAWYERS INCORPORATION SERVICE, N. STAUSS CUSTOMER SERVICE LIAISON - SACRAMENTO, CA] SERVED APR-28-2022, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT LUGG, INC.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-23-2022 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-23-2022 BY MICHELLE TONG. PLAINTIFF JOSHUA LEVY IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT LUGG, INC. IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: A. DATT / D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
